    BeanFilter
    BeanMetaInitializer.buildBeanFilter(BeanInfo<?> cm)
    Builds the marshalling-side BeanFilter for the supplied class, reading @Marshalled and @BeanType annotations.

    Returns the bean filter associated with this bean.
